User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the SquadForge application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for login.

phone.description: The optional phone number of the user.

avatarUrl.description: An optional URL to the user's avatar image.

notificationsEnabled.description: A flag indicating whether the user has enabled global notifications.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a team within the SquadForge application, where members can collaborate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

sport.description: The sport associated with the team (e.g., 'Basketball', 'Soccer').

teamLogoUrl.description: An optional URL to the team's logo image.

heroImageUrl.description: A custom hero image for the team feed.

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code used for joining the team.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created this team. (Relationship: User 1:N Team)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the team was created.

members.description: A map of user IDs to their roles for authorization.

TeamMembership.title: TeamMembership
TeamMembership.description: Represents a user's membership in a specific team, including their role and roster details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TeamMembership entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who is a member of the team. (Relationship: User 1:N TeamMembership)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team the user is a member of. (Relationship: Team 1:N TeamMembership)

role.description: The role of the user within the team, either 'Admin' or 'Member'.

position.description: The optional playing position of the member within the team (editable by Admin).

jerseyNumber.description: The optional jersey number of the member within the team (editable by Admin).

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined the team.

FeedPost.title: FeedPost
FeedPost.description: Represents a post in a team's activity feed, visible to all team members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FeedPost entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this post belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N FeedPost)

authorId.description: Reference to the User who created this post. (Relationship: User 1:N FeedPost)

content.description: The textual content of the post.

imageUrl.description: An optional URL to a single image attached to the post.

linkedEventId.description: An optional reference to an Event associated with this post. (Relationship: Event 1:N FeedPost)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the post was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a scheduled event for a team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this event belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Event)

startTime.description: The start time of the event.

endTime.description: The optional end time of the event.

location.description: The location where the event will take place.

description.description: A detailed description of the event.

recurrenceDays.description: Days of the week for weekly recurrence (e.g. ['Mon', 'Wed']).

recurrenceEndDate.description: The date when recurrence should stop.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User (Admin) who created this event. (Relationship: User 1:N Event)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the event was created.

definition.description: Stores an individual user's specific membership details.
Contains posts for the team's activity feed.
Stores scheduled events for a team.
